llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 14.1 (Resolution 2 - School Bond Election) was moved up to be taken after item 11.1 (Bond Action Items) and before item 12.1 (School/Committee Assignments), per board member request to accommodate attendee interest.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I have a motion to move them? So moved. Second roll call, please.
